🥋 handling the old guys first…

Banff · another lap around the sun

Happy Birthday,
Schnoz!

Now go kick an old guy, out-hike everyone, and absolutely crush your weekend in Banff. 🥋🏔️ P.S. I made you a little machine that turns any photo into an oil painting.

Happy Birthday, Schnoz 🎂

Your own oil-painting machine 🎨 — take or upload any photo and watch it get painted.

 

 

any photo you take becomes an oil painting · it never leaves your device

This gift needs to be opened from a web address (not a file on disk). It's already live — just open the link.
